__fixture__.name: account_free_local_inspectable_policy
__fixture__.scenario: Account-free local mode keeps an inspectable policy bundle visible without granting the bundle any authority over managed-gated features. The bundle is scoped local_advisory_scope_only and the local-only lane posture is local_only_inspectable_only. Local desktop-core capabilities remain fully available under ADR-0001.
contract_sections: Policy-bundle row anatomy / Scope and narrowing axes

policy_source_label: Aureline build preload – account-free inspectable policy

signer_identity.signing_scope_note: Build-preload signer. Inspectable-only posture; bundle carries no authority over managed-gated features.

scope_selector.selector_note: Local-only advisory scope: visible to inspectors and the CLI so users can see exactly what the local preload contains; no managed-only features are gated by it.

narrowing_rules.rule_note: Describes the default restricted-mode invariants so users can inspect them locally. Does not widen or narrow trust beyond ADR-0001's floor.
Names the default redaction posture applied to local-only support exports.

distribution_statuses.note: Preload bundle loaded from the signed build image; no network fetch was required.

last_known_good_linkage.fallback_posture_note: First preload seed in this build; there is no prior bundle to fall back to. The seed itself is the fallback for runtime-preload-origin lanes.

review_schedule.grace_window_note: Runtime-preload seeds have no review obligation; they are replaced by a fresher bundle if one is ever fetched, but are never the basis for new managed narrowing.

local_only_lane_note: Bundle is visible to local inspectors and the CLI so users can audit it; it has no authority over managed-gated features and never blocks local editing, save, undo, search, local Git, tasks in a trusted workspace, or BYOK AI.

locally_inspectable_fields: The bundle version, epoch, and signer authority.
The capability classes the bundle advises on and the direction of the advice.
The distribution source and freshness classes.
explainability_envelope.explainability_note: Every field renders from the local bundle; no vendor console is required to explain the posture.
